case_title: AVILES, EUGENE TONY vs. MUNFORD, BERNARD IND & DBA MUNFORD'S QUALITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVILES, EUGENE TONY AS TO DEFENDANT MUNFORD, BERNARD IND & DBA MUNFORD'S QUALITY FURNITURE RESTORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVILES, EUGENE TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNFORD, BERNARD IND & DBA MUNFORD'S QUALITY FURNITURE RESTORATION $384.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $464.00

parties.name: MUNFORD, BERNARD IND & DBA MUNFORD'S QUALITY, FURNITURE RESTORATION
